name: Nucor Corporation
description: Nucor Corporation is the largest steel producer in the United States and the largest 'mini-mill' steelmaker, utilizing electric arc furnace technology to recycle scrap metal into new steel products. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, the company operates numerous facilities across North America, producing a wide range of products including carbon and alloy steel in bars, beams, sheets, and plates; hollow structural section tubing; electrical conduit; and steel piling. Nucor is also North America's largest recycler, processing millions of tons of scrap annually to support its sustainable manufacturing processes.

investment_theses.company_type: Steel Production / US Domestic Supply for Construction
